$comment: Plan 25 per-target struct variants — x86-64-linux leg. <sys/stat.h>'s `struct stat` has per-target `variants`; the (arch=x86_64, format=elf) variant is the 144-byte glibc layout, so `sizeof(struct stat)` folds to 144 → st_mode(40)+st_blocks(2)=42. Single elf-x86_64 target (POSIX header → availableObjectFormats:[elf]; no pe/macho arm). Runs natively on the linux CI leg; cross-compiles (compile-checks the real descriptor) locally. The release arm runs the shipped optimizer over the struct sizeof/field shapes. Paired with shipped_struct_stat_arm64 (128B) — the arm64 leg is the red-on-disable witness for the variant selector.
